_meta.title: PCC Group Job Role Architecture — Master Reference
_meta.description: Single source of truth for shared taxonomies (companies, leadership levels, job families, JE framework). Reconciled from Job_Role_Architecture_PreciseGroup.xlsx + 196 live JD .docx files. Supersedes the company/level/JE definitions previously held in CLAUDE.md, HANDOFF_TO_NEW_CLAUDE.md, memory/context/pcc-group.md and Knowledge/PCC_JD_System_Reference.md where they disagree.
_meta.status: DRAFT — pending HR confirmation of items in open_decisions[]

job_family_codes._note: Every family code currently observed across the 196 live JDs, mapped to a consolidated family. Codes flagged with alias_of are synonyms recommended for normalization (see open_decisions D4) but NOT yet renamed — existing job codes are preserved.

TECH.note: overloaded: used for DBA (digital) and CTO (executive)

scoring._confirmed: Verified 2026-06-15 from live JD content (every JE table header states 'ข้อ 26 Max=6, ข้อ 27 Max=7, ข้อ 30 Max=150'). Resolves the 150-vs-200 puzzle in D2: the total exceeds 150 because item 30 alone uses a stepped scale up to 150.

open_decisions.title: Company list confirmed at 9
open_decisions.detail: Adopted the 9-company list that matches the 196 live JDs + Excel registry. Retired PCT / PCR / PEP and the 'PEM = Energy & Mining' definition that were stale in HANDOFF/CLAUDE/memory.
open_decisions.action: Update CLAUDE.md, HANDOFF_TO_NEW_CLAUDE.md, memory/context/pcc-group.md to match this file.

open_decisions.title: JE per-item scale — RESOLVED from JD content
open_decisions.detail: The scale is items 1-25/28/29 = 0-5, item 26 max 6, item 27 max 7, and item 30 (Stakeholders) on a stepped scale up to 150. That is why totals reach ~200 even though most items are 0-5. Encoded in je_framework.scoring. The Mar-2026 criteria doc / Reference.md still describe the old flat 1-5 (max 150) and should be updated.
open_decisions.action: Update the JE criteria doc + Knowledge/Reference.md to document item 30's stepped scale.

open_decisions.title: JE-table contamination across JDs (CRITICAL — affects pay grading)
open_decisions.detail: Pilot (7 JDs) found ~4 with JE sections copy-pasted from a different role and not updated: HR Officer L1 carries the Facility Officer JE table; Agentic AI Ops L1 carries Facility/Accounting JE + an Accounting KR#5; Head of Human Capital L4 carries the Business Manager (HV Electrical) JE table; CFO L5 carries the COO JE table. KRs/specs are usually role-correct, but the 30-item JE breakdown (and sometimes the title/code header line) is wrong, so the JE score cannot be trusted for pay grading.
open_decisions.action: During Phase 1 full extraction, validate every JE table against its role; flag/regenerate contaminated ones. Track per-record in job_roles.json#/[].data_quality.

open_decisions.title: JE total vs level-range mismatch / inversion
open_decisions.detail: Actual JE totals do not always sit in the level band, partly due to D6 and inconsistent use of item 30's stepped scale. Pilot examples: HCDM-L3 = 121 (above L3 band 88-102) while Head of HC L4 = 112 (below L4 band 118-128) — an L3 outscoring an L4. The cause is item 30 scored as '25' (stepped) for the L3 but '4' (flat) for the L4.
open_decisions.action: A proposed item-30-by-level mapping + per-level baselines are in data/je_level_baseline.json (used to regenerate contaminated JE). HR to confirm the mapping (esp. L4) so totals respect bands without inversion.

open_decisions.title: Duplicate L5 file — PCC-DT-VPDT-L5
open_decisions.detail: Active/Level 5 contains both PCC-DT-VPDT-L5 v1.0 (VP Digital Transformation) and v2.0 (VP Intellectual Capital Development). Same job code, two files. Active folder has 196 files but ~195 unique job codes.
open_decisions.action: Move v1.0 to Inactive/ ; keep v2.0 as the live record.

open_decisions.title: Family-code normalization
open_decisions.detail: Same function uses different codes across companies (SALES/SAL/MKT/CX/COM, ENG/TEC/TECH, LRC/LEGAL, BD/BIZ/STR/INV, OPS/PWR/OPM/FAC). job_family_codes maps all of them today; alias_of marks recommended merges. Renaming changes existing job codes/filenames, so defer to a Phase-1 migration decision.
open_decisions.action: HR to approve a canonical family-code set before any rename.

open_decisions.title: Structural gaps
open_decisions.detail: PCC Corporate has no L4 (jumps L3 -> DCEO L5). Only 1 L6 role exists. No L4 in the Agentic-AI track (AI Capital Director).
